segments.text: I've done it. I've been there.
I'll go back someday, I'm sure.
I found the PDC is holding the lock lower.
Come on, man. Start scoring, man.
Okay, and I say, score ready? You say yes?
Two Alpha. Alpha, put two Alpha.
And then you got Alpha Delta.
That was directed towards Anthony only.
No, no, no. You're good. You're good.
I have plenty of space to practice.
And then we got the steel.
Put your mags on the table.
Don't put your mags or anything on the safe hand.
And then just try to strip your gun
and make sure you can do your trick with me
because if you do this one, it's happening all the time.
Just try to feel where it is you feel that
and also just make sure you watch your fingers
I'd rather you drop your mag than hit your finger on the trigger.
If you're finished, unload shell clear.
